name: Makoto Kurume
description: Mitsumi's classmate. She is introverted and worries about becoming isolated; she meets Mitsumi when she joined the student council to join some kind of community. Despite not liking flirtatious people, she meets Yuzuki through Mitsumi and they become close friends.

name: Minmay Lynn
description: Born in Japan (to a Chinese father and Japanese mother) as Linn Minmei, Minmay moved in with her uncle Shaochin and aunt Feichun on South Ataria Island in hopes of finding the path to fulfill her dream of becoming a star. On the day of the Zentradi invasion, she meets Hikaru and a series of events leads to her being swept off on the SDF-1 Macross along with the rest of the surviving population from that island. name: Shouichirou Yukimura
description: __Height__: 164 cm The Vice President of the Student Council, Shouichirou Yukimura tries to help Misaki where he can, and enjoys office routine. At first, he, like the rest of the student council, is fearful of Misaki, but he eventually comes to be on fairly close terms with her and Usui. Yukimura is hard-working, earnest, and capable of doing most administrative work, but is not athletic in the least, especially in comparison to Misaki and Usui. name: Shuuichi Natori
description: __Height:__ 175cm A man who is also able to see spirits. He is a famous actor and exorcist and has a lizard birthmark that moves around on his body. He has the ability to manipulate paper dolls and has three youkai under his command. Natsume tends to disapprove of his forceful exorcism methods.

name: Tae-Seong Jo
description: Initially not wanting Hae-Bom to live with them, he changed his views to sharing what he had with Hae-Bom. Tae-Seong ends up joining Hae-Bom in class.

name: Ymir Fritz
description: Ymir Fritz was the progenitor of the Eldians. When she was a young girl, she awakened the power of the Titans and became the first Titan, the Founding Titan. After she died, her spirit was split into the Nine Titans. She is observed to be a quiet character that does not reveal her true intentions/motives. ~! name: Azusa Kannawa
description: __Height:__ 163 cm __Birthplace:__ Ooita Prefecture Azusa is cool and competent but clumsy. She is easily misunderstood, but is actually sensitive and compassionate, and is sincere in her approach to both her work and her junior staff. A hobby of hers is gaming.

name: Azusa Mukami
description: __Race:__ Vampire __School Grade:__ 2nd year High School Student __Height:__ 170 cm

name: Daryun
description: Formerly a high-ranking military officer, Daryun is demoted from his position in the opening of the anime. His new mission is to protect and serve Arslan. Daryun and Arslan become close friends. In the style of samurai, Daryun is loyal to a fault, and at point tells Arslan that whatever his true origins may be, Daryun regards him as his prince. His fighting skills are so legendary that, at one point, Prince Rajendra praises him as the greatest warrior in both Pars and Shindra.

name: Eriko
description: __Race:__ Fiend __Height:__ 154 cm Eriko is an obsessive girl who is infatuated with [Yuuki](https://anilist.co/character/160249/Yuuki), often going to large lengths to gain his affection. She is shown to be drastic and manipulative, akin to that of a Yandere. With few exceptions, she is often dismissive of the people around her. name: Jae-Hwan
description: Jaehwan is a young, South Korean male who was summoned to the Tower of Nightmares, a large construct consisting of 100 floors brimming with perilous monsters. Jaehwan's sole mission is climbing the Tower and saving humanity, which suffers from "Tower Impacts".

name: Nemesis
description: Nemesis is a sadistic, demanding girl who is responsible in giving orders to Mea. She uses Mea as her spy to look after Yami's changes and recent life. In addition, Nemesis is the one behind the plans to make Yami return to her emotionless-assassin's life again. name: Noboru Taki
description: __Height:__ 184cm Taki is the new music teacher in Kitauji High School and serves as the adviser to the concert band club. He is also in charge of Class 5 of the second-year students. He is polite and has a methodical personality. He emphasizes independence in his students, and to this end he pushes them to reach their goal of going to the national competition.

name: Pururut
description: Pururut is a character in Neptunia V, and is the CPU of Planeptune in a 1980s-parallel universe. Her nickname is Pururun and she's known for her gentle appearance but is quite difficult to read. Pururut has a very gentle appearance, and does not seem to be a bad person or naughty. However, she is usually skipping out on her Goddess duties, much like how Neptune would if given the chance to go and have fun instead. name: Sennen Hakushaku
description: The story's main antagonist. Also known as "the Earl of Millennium". He tricks people with dead relatives and friends into creating Demons (Akuma). He is a sorcerer from long ago, and he plans to lead the world to its destruction. Some time in the past he formed an alliance with the Noah Clan, who call him "Duke Millennium"(Except Road who calls him Millenie).
